## Summary

Explain the problem and the proposed change.

## Compatibility and save impact

Describe affected API IDs, V71.44 targets, registries, saves, UI, AI, and known
interactions with other mods.

## Validation

List the public build or focused checks you performed and any owner in-game test
that is still required.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have the right to submit every file in this contribution.
- [ ] I did not include Songs of Syx source/data, Workshop assets, credentials,
      saves, logs, private paths, generated JARs, or release archives.
- [ ] Consumer-facing code imports only public `choir.api` packages.
- [ ] Stable IDs and existing public behavior are preserved or the compatibility
      change is explicitly documented.
- [ ] I accept the contribution terms in Section 4 of the repository LICENSE.
